items.title: People trapped under collapsed building in Philippines
items.dek: A search operation has so far rescued 24 people with no deaths reported at the site, in a city near the capital Manila.
items.body: A search operation has so far rescued 24 people with no deaths reported at the site, in a city near the capital Manila.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Disney sued over new facial recognition technology at Disneyland entrances
items.dek: The Walt Disney Company is facing a class-action lawsuit over its use of facial recognition technology at its Disneyland theme park entrances. The lawsuit accus
items.body: The Walt Disney Company is facing a class-action lawsuit over its use of facial recognition technology at its Disneyland theme park entrances. The lawsuit accuses the company of violating visitors' privacy rights and consumer protection laws. "Disney does not adequately disclose the use of their biometric collection, so consumers — which almost always include children — have no idea that Disney is collecting this highly sensitive data," according to the filing. submitted by /u/miauguau44 [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Bolivian minister's convoy ambushed while overseeing roadblock clearance
items.dek: Security forces were met by resistance while attempting to clear highway barriers, amid unrest over the government's economic policies.
items.body: Security forces were met by resistance while attempting to clear highway barriers, amid unrest over the government's economic policies.
items.author: IriLine Desk
